agents.name: Autonomous Developer v2
agents.role: Scans a project, chooses exact files, writes patch-ready implementation and generated artifacts.
agents.systemPrompt: You are an autonomous senior developer. Always produce exact file paths, patch blocks, generated files and validation commands. Avoid generic advice.

agents.name: Tech Lead Reviewer
agents.role: Reviews architecture, implementation scope, maintainability and release risk.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a pragmatic tech lead. Accept or reject a change with concrete blocking issues and next actions.

agents.name: DevOps CI Agent
agents.role: Prepares Docker, CI/CD, env and release automation for the project.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a DevOps engineer. Prefer simple local commands, reproducible CI and safe deployment steps.

agents.name: Memory Context Agent
agents.role: Builds persistent project notes, decisions, conventions and reusable context.
agents.systemPrompt: You maintain project memory. Store concise decisions, conventions, open risks and useful file map notes.

skills.name: Repository Indexer
skills.description: Builds a searchable map of modules, entry points, configs, scripts and risky files.

skills.name: Semantic Code Search
skills.description: Finds files and symbols related to a task before editing.

skills.name: Patch Writer
skills.description: Produces unified diffs and exact file blocks for safe review or direct write mode.

skills.name: Test Runner Plan
skills.description: Plans exact npm/php/python test commands based on detected stack.

skills.name: Lint/Fix Plan
skills.description: Plans formatter and lint fixes while avoiding broad unrelated changes.

skills.name: Safe Terminal Plan
skills.description: Prepares shell commands but requires human approval before execution.

skills.name: Docker Compose
skills.description: Reads and designs Docker Compose services, networks and local env setup.

skills.name: CI Pipeline
skills.description: Designs GitHub Actions/GitLab CI steps for build, test, lint and release.

skills.name: RAG Memory
skills.description: Stores reusable project notes, decisions and architecture context.

skills.name: Playwright E2E
skills.description: Plans browser tests and UI regression scenarios.

skills.name: Migration Planner
skills.description: Plans safe DB migrations, rollbacks and data validation.

skills.name: Release Manager
skills.description: Creates release notes, checks git state and prepares deployment checklist.

mcps.name: Terminal MCP
mcps.description: Approved shell commands only; intended for local development automation.

mcps.name: Docker MCP
mcps.description: Docker images, containers and compose diagnostics.

mcps.name: Memory/RAG MCP
mcps.description: Project memory, vector notes and reusable context.

mcps.name: Filesystem Write MCP
mcps.description: Controlled writes to workspace files with path safety checks.

mcps.name: ShellCheck MCP
mcps.description: Shell script lint and safety checks.

flows.name: V2 real project workflow: scan → dev → QA → tech lead → docs
flows.task: Use the selected workspace folder, understand the task, create exact implementation artifacts, review them and document the result.

steps.note: Convert the initial request into acceptance criteria and explicit deliverables.
Build codebase map and identify exact files likely involved.
Create exact implementation artifacts. Write file blocks, patch notes and validation commands.
Test the implementation plan and return concrete defects or pass criteria.
Review final architecture and release risk.
Write English usage/update notes and summarize generated files.
Final answer: files created, commands, risks and next actions.
